FAIL src/features/liveops-config/__tests__/progressive-unlock-contract.test.ts
  FeatureAvailability contract
    disabled state
      √ returns all-false for disabled_beta features at any session count (12 ms)
      √ returns all-false for disabled_beta features even at 999 sessions (1 ms)
    unlocked state
      √ returns all-true for core features at 0 sessions (1 ms)
      √ returns all-true for progressively unlocked features past threshold (1 ms)
    teased state
      √ shows entry point but blocks navigation, queries, routes, events, notifications (1 ms)
    locked state
      √ returns all-false for features before teaser threshold (1 ms)
  motivation profile effects
    √ accelerates Boss unlock for game_like profile (7→5) (1 ms)
    √ delays Boss unlock for calm profile (7→15) (1 ms)
    √ hides Boss from calm profile entirely until 20 sessions (1 ms)
    √ accelerates Content Study for student profile (12→5) (1 ms)
    √ delays Content Study for calm profile (12→18) (1 ms)
    √ accelerates Challenges for intense profile (5→3)
    × delays Challenges for calm profile (5→8) (5 ms)
    √ accelerates Companion for calm and student profiles (3→2) (2 ms)
    √ delays Companion for intense profile (3→4) (1 ms)
    √ does not modify thresholds when no motivation profile is provided (2 ms)
  home stage progression
    √ NEW_USER (0 sessions) has CORE tier only (2 ms)
    √ ACTIVATING (1-2 sessions) has CORE tier only (3 ms)
    √ ENGAGED (3-9 sessions) has SECONDARY tier (1 ms)
    √ POWER_USER (10+ sessions) has EXPANSION tier
  challenges unlock timing
    √ stays locked at 1 session (old threshold)
    × teases at 3 sessions
    √ unlocks at 5 sessions for default profile (2 ms)
  intent-based feature gating
    √ Content Study unlocks at 5 sessions for student profile (2 ms)
    √ Content Study unlocks at 12 sessions for worker profile (1 ms)
    √ Boss unlocks at 5 sessions for game_like profile
    √ Boss unlocks at 9 sessions for intense profile (1 ms)
  route registration contract
    √ does not register routes for disabled beta features (1 ms)
    √ does not register routes for new users (2 ms)
    √ registers challenge route after unlock
    √ registers boss route for gamer profile at 5 sessions (1 ms)
    √ does not register boss route for calm profile at 5 sessions
    √ registers study route for student profile at 5 sessions (2 ms)
    √ does not register study route for default profile at 5 sessions
  query gating contract
    √ blocks challenge queries before unlock (1 ms)
    × allows challenge queries after unlock (1 ms)
    √ blocks boss query before unlock (6 ms)
    √ blocks study query before unlock (2 ms)
    √ blocks economy query for new users (1 ms)
    √ blocks coach query for new users
  first 7 days journey
    √ day 0: only core features visible, nothing else registered (2 ms)
    √ day 1-2: companion teases, nothing else unlocks (1 ms)
    √ day 3: companion detail unlocks (1 ms)
    √ day 5: challenges unlock for default profile (1 ms)
    √ day 7: boss unlocks for game_like profile, but not for calm (2 ms)
    √ full 20-session progression: all progressive features unlocked for gamer (1 ms)
  single source of truth
    × FeatureAvailability contract is consumed by home feature runtime (1 ms)
    √ FeatureAvailability contract is consumed by route exposure (1 ms)
    √ does not leak disabled feature access through any path (1 ms)

[36mfunction[39m processBehaviorSignal(userId[33m:[39m string[33m,[39m signalType[33m:[39m [33mSignalType[39m[33m,[39m value[33m:[39m number[33m,[39m metadata[33m:[39m [33m=>[39m repository[33m.[39maddBehaviorSignal(validatedSignal)[33m,[39m { maxAttempts[33m:[39m [35m3[39m }[33m,[39m [32m"add-behavior-signal"[39m)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m profile [33mDate[39m[33m.[39mnow()[33m;[39m [36mreturn[39m signals[33m.[39mmap((signal) [33m=>[39m { [36mconst[39m ageMs [33m=[39m now [33m-[39m signal[33m.[39mtimestamp[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m ageDays [33m=[39m ageMs [33m/[39m ([35m1000[39m [33m*[39m [35m60[39m [33m*[39m [35m60[39m [33m*[39m [35m24[39m)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m decayFactor [33m=[39m [33mDEFAULT_SIGNAL_CONFIG[39m[33m.[39mdecayFactors[signal[33m.[39msignalType] [33m||[39m [35m0.95[39m[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m decayMultiplier [33m=[39m [33mMath[39m[33m.[39mpow(decayFactor[33m,[39m ageDays)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m weight [33m=[39m [33mDEFAULT_SIGNAL_CONFIG[39m[33m.[39msignalWeights[signal[33m.[39msignalType] [33m||[39m [35m0.7[39m[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m adjustedValue [33m=[39m signal[33m.[39mvalue [33m*[39m decayMultiplier[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m adjustedConfidence [33m=[39m }[33m;[39m })[33m;[39m } [36mfunction[39m aggregateSignals(signals[33m:[39m [33mBehaviorSignal[39m[])[33m:[39m [33mBehaviorSignal[39m[] { [36mconst[39m grouped [33m=[39m [36mnew[39m [33mMap[39m[33m<[39m[33mSignalType[39m[33m,[39m [33mBehaviorSignal[39m[][33m>[39m()[33m;[39m [36mfor[39m ([36mconst[39m signal [36mof[39m signals) { [36mconst[39m ([36mconst[39m [signalType[33m,[39m typeSignals] [36mof[39m grouped) { [36mconst[39m sorted [33m=[39m typeSignals[33m.[39msort((a[33m,[39m b) [33m=>[39m b[33m.[39mtimestamp [33m-[39m a[33m.[39mtimestamp)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m mostRecent [33m=[39m sorted[[35m0[39m][33m![39m[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m recentWindow [33m=[39m [33m+[39m s[33m.[39mvalue [33m*[39m (recentWindow[33m.[39mlength [33m-[39m idx)[33m,[39m [35m0[39m)[33m;[39m [36mconst[39m weightSum [33m=[39m s[33m.[39mconfidence[33m,[39m [35m0[39m) [33m/[39m recentWindow[33m.[39mlength[33m;[39m aggregated[33m.[39mpush({ [33m...[39mmostRecent[33m,[39m value[33m:[39m [33mSignalType[39m[33m,[39m value[33m:[39m number[33m,[39m metadata[33m:[39m [33mRecord[39m[33m<[39m[33mstring[39m[33m,[39m unknown[33m>[39m)[33m:[39m number { [36mconst[39m [33mSOCIAL_ENGAGEMENT[39m[33m:[39m [35m0.6[39m[33m,[39m [33mCHALLENGE_COMPLETION_RATE[39m[33m:[39m [35m0.85[39m[33m,[39m
     [90m   |[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           [31m[1m^[22m[39m
     [90m 2 |[39m [33mBOSS_PARTICIPATION[39m[33m:[39m [35m0.9[39m[33m,[39m [33mMORNING_PERSON[39m[33m:[39m [35m0.75[39m[33m,[39m [33mNIGHT_OWL[39m[33m:[39m [35m0.7[39m[33m;[39m [36mif[39m (metadata[33m.[39msampleSize [33m&&[39m [36mtypeof[39m metadata[33m.[39msampleSize [33m===[39m [32m"number"[39m) { [36mif[39m confidence)[33m;[39m } [36mfunction[39m calculateConfidenceLevel(dataPoints[33m:[39m number[33m,[39m signals[33m:[39m [33mBehaviorSignal[39m[])[33m:[39m [32m"LOW"[39m [33m|[39m [32m"MEDIUM"[39m [33m|[39m [32m"HIGH"[39m { [36mif[39m (dataPoints [33m<[39m [33mDEFAULT_SIGNAL_CONFIG[39m[33m.[39mcoldStartThreshold) { [36mreturn[39m [32m"LOW"[39m[33m;[39m } [35m15[39m) { [36mreturn[39m [32m"HIGH"[39m[33m;[39m } [36mif[39m (avgConfidence [33m>=[39m medium [33m&&[39m dataPoints [33m>=[39m [35m10[39m) { [36mreturn[39m [32m"MEDIUM"[39m[33m;[39m } [36mreturn[39m [32m"LOW"[39m[33m;[39m } [36mfunction[39m calculateExpiration(signalType[33m:[39m [33mSignalType[39m)[33m:[39m number { [36mconst[39m
